fixes.label: JupiterClient signature drift
fixes.description: Updated test calls to match current JupiterClient API: swap_transaction(quote_response=...), execution_order_v2(..., taker=...), build_quote_params (renamed from build_order_params)

fixes.label: JSDS tests conflicting with Hachi
fixes.description: Added settings.hachi_dripper_enabled = False in _settings helper. .env HACHI_DRIPPER_ENABLED=true was leaking via load_dotenv(override=True).

fixes.label: test_scan_persistence env pollution
fixes.description: Added LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=false and DRY_RUN=true to _base_env. Earlier tests leaked LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=true into os.environ via load_dotenv; monkeypatch.chdir prevented .env re-load but not the leaked value.

fixes.label: scoring test env mismatch
fixes.description: Added sell_route_available=True to the good-structure candidate. .env REQUIRE_JUP_SELL_ROUTE=true means a good candidate must have a sell route; TokenCandidate defaults sell_route_available=False.

fixes.label: exit_liquidity strict-mode mismatch
fixes.description: Force-assigned settings.require_birdeye_exit_liquidity = require_exit after load_settings(). .env REQUIRE_BIRDEYE_EXIT_LIQUIDITY=false was overriding the test's monkeypatched true via load_dotenv(override=True).

conclusion: 153 passed, 0 failed. All 13 previously known failures are fixed. No tests weakened or removed.
